'''Hordon Cal''' was a hot ball of rock located in the [[Thanta Zilbra system/Legends|Thanta Zilbra system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], orbited by a small moon. Both were destroyed during the [[Corellian Crisis|Starbuster Plot]] by the [[Sacorrian Triad]].
